zh.lifeSummary: 當Johannes Baur於1626年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格奧斯塔爾布可萊斯史亞比 姆爾德可萊代巴賀時，他的父親Hans Joerg Baur41歲，母親Magdalena Scheufelin40歲。他於1653年8月28日與Magdalena Kayser在德國爾特波格維爾仁海姆格洛斯代巴賀結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1693年5月17日在他的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johannes Baur于1626年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格奧斯塔爾布可萊斯史亞比 姆爾德可萊代巴賀时，他的父亲Hans Joerg Baur41岁，母亲Magdalena Scheufelin40岁。他于1653年8月28日与Magdalena Kayser在德国爾特波格維爾仁海姆格洛斯代巴賀结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1693年5月17日在他的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Uli, Ulrich, Alfons, Arno, Erwin, Friedrich, Fritz, Urs, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.
South German: variant of   Bauer   ‘peasant’ or ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Bauer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Fritz, Helmut, Heinz, Manfred, Franz, Gerhard, Johannes, Wolfgang.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): status name for a peasant or nickname meaning ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’, from Middle High German (ge)būr, Middle Low German būr, denoting an occupant of a būr, a small dwelling or building. This word later fell together with Middle High German būwære, an agent noun from Old High German būwan ‘to cultivate’, later also (at first in Low German dialects) ‘to build’. The precise meaning of the Jewish surname, which is of later formation, is unclear. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Denmark, Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic status names or surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Johannes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Johannes Baur was born in 1626, in Kleindeinbach, Schwäbisch Gmünd, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, his father, Hans Joerg Baur, was 41 and his mother, Magdalena Scheufelin, was 40. He married Magdalena Kayser on 28 August 1653, in Großdeinbach, Welzheim, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 17 May 1693, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johannes Baur est né en 1626, à Kleindeinbach, Schwäbisch Gmünd, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Hans Joerg Baur, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Magdalena Scheufelin, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Magdalena Kayser le 28 août 1653, à Großdeinbach, Welzheim, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 17 mai 1693, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johannes Baur 1626 in Kleindeinbach, Schwäbisch Gmünd, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hans Joerg Baur 41 und seine Mutter Magdalena Scheufelin 40. Er hat am 28. August 1653 in Großdeinbach, Welzheim, Württemberg, Deutschland Magdalena Kayser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Mai 1693 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johannes Baur è nato il nel 1626 nel Kleindeinbach, Schwäbisch Gmünd, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Hans Joerg Baur, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Magdalena Scheufelin, aveva 40 anni. ko.lifeSummary: Johannes Baur(이)가 1626년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 오스탤브크레이스 슈wa비슈 그u드 클레인데인바치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hans Joerg Baur(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Magdalena Scheufelin(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1653년 8월 28일 독일 wu르테버그 웰즈하임 그로ss데인바치에서 Magdalena Kayser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1693년 5월 17일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johannes Baur nasceu em 1626, em Kleindeinbach, Schwäbisch Gmünd, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Hans Joerg Baur, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Magdalena Scheufelin, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Magdalena Kayser em 28 de agosto de 1653, em Großdeinbach, Welzheim, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de maio de 1693, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johannes Baur родился в 1626 г. в местности клиндинбач, щвaбищ гмuнд, осталбкрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Hans Joerg Baur было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Magdalena Scheufelin, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Magdalena Kayser 28 августа 1653 г. в местности гроssдинбач, велжим, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 17 мая 1693 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.
